servers.name: Brave Search
servers.description: Web and local search using the Brave Search API. Returns organic results, news, and local listings.

env_required.description: Brave Search API key — get one free at https://api.search.brave.com

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description: Fetch any URL and return its content as markdown or raw HTML. Useful for reading web pages, APIs, and documentation.

env_optional.description: Custom User-Agent string for HTTP requests

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read, write, move, search and manage local files and directories. Sandboxed to allowed paths.

env_required.description: Absolute path of directory the server may access

servers.name: Git
servers.description: Read and manipulate local Git repositories — log, diff, blame, branches, commits, and status.

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Interact with GitHub repositories — search code, manage issues, pull requests, files, and branches via the GitHub API.

env_required.description: GitHub personal access token with repo scope

servers.name: GitLab
servers.description: Interact with GitLab projects — manage issues, merge requests, files, pipelines, and repositories.

servers.name: Sentry
servers.description: Query Sentry for errors, issues, events, releases, and project stats. Useful for debugging and monitoring.

env_required.description: Sentry auth token (Settings → API → Auth Tokens)

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description: Full browser automation via Microsoft Playwright — navigate, click, fill, screenshot, extract content, run JS.

servers.name: Puppeteer
servers.description: Browser automation — navigate pages, take screenshots, click elements, fill forms, evaluate JavaScript.

servers.name: Google Maps
servers.description: Geocoding, reverse geocoding, directions, place search, elevation, and distance matrix via the Google Maps API.

servers.name: Google Drive
servers.description: Search, read, list, and export files from Google Drive including Docs, Sheets, and Slides.

servers.name: Notion
servers.description: Read and write Notion pages, databases, blocks, and comments. Official Notion MCP integration.

servers.name: Slack
servers.description: Post messages, reply to threads, list channels, and retrieve Slack conversation history.

servers.name: Discord
servers.description: Send messages, manage channels, read message history, and interact with Discord servers via the bot API.

servers.name: Linear
servers.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, cycles, and teams. Create, update, and search issues programmatically.

servers.name: Jira & Confluence (Atlassian)
servers.description: Read and write Jira issues, projects, sprints, and Confluence pages via the Atlassian REST API.

servers.name: Stripe
servers.description: Interact with Stripe — query customers, payments, subscriptions, invoices, and products via the Stripe API.

servers.name: PostgreSQL
servers.description: Read-only and read-write access to a PostgreSQL database. Run queries, list schemas, describe tables.

servers.name: SQLite
servers.description: Create and query SQLite databases. Run SQL queries, inspect schemas, and build business intelligence tools.

env_required.description: Absolute path to the SQLite .db file

servers.name: MySQL
servers.description: Connect to MySQL/MariaDB databases, run queries, list tables, describe schemas, and execute DDL/DML.

servers.name: MongoDB
servers.description: Query and manage MongoDB collections — find, insert, update, delete, aggregate, and manage indexes.

servers.name: Redis
servers.description: Interact with Redis — get/set keys, manage hashes, lists, sets, streams, and pub/sub channels.

servers.name: Supabase
servers.description: Query Supabase tables, run SQL, manage auth users, storage buckets, edge functions, and realtime channels.

env_required.description: Service role key from Project Settings → API

servers.name: Cloudflare
servers.description: Manage Cloudflare Workers, KV, D1, R2, and DNS records. Deploy and query Workers from the command line.

servers.name: AWS Knowledge Base (Bedrock)
servers.description: Retrieve and query Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases using RAG for enterprise document search.

servers.name: HubSpot
servers.description: Manage HubSpot CRM — contacts, companies, deals, tickets, properties, and timeline events.

servers.name: Shopify
servers.description: Manage Shopify stores — products, orders, customers, inventory, and collections via the Admin API.

servers.name: Airtable
servers.description: Read, create, update, and delete Airtable records. List bases, tables, and fields. Run formula queries.

servers.name: Gmail
servers.description: Read, send, search, and manage Gmail messages, threads, labels, and attachments.

servers.name: Google Calendar
servers.description: Create, read, update, and delete Google Calendar events. List calendars and manage attendees.

env_required.description: OAuth2 refresh token with calendar scope

servers.name: Vercel
servers.description: Manage Vercel deployments, projects, domains, environment variables, and logs via the Vercel API.

servers.name: Docker
servers.description: Manage Docker containers, images, volumes, and networks. Run, stop, inspect, and exec into containers.

servers.name: Kubernetes
servers.description: Manage Kubernetes clusters — list and describe pods, deployments, services, logs, and apply manifests.

servers.name: AWS
servers.description: Interact with AWS services — S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch, DynamoDB, SQS, and more via the AWS SDK.

servers.name: Figma
servers.description: Inspect Figma files, frames, components, and design tokens. Extract styles, assets, and layout properties.

servers.name: Twilio
servers.description: Send SMS, WhatsApp messages, make voice calls, and manage Twilio phone numbers and conversations.

servers.name: SendGrid
servers.description: Send transactional and marketing emails, manage contacts and lists, query stats via the SendGrid API.

servers.name: Asana
servers.description: Manage Asana tasks, projects, teams, and workspaces. Create, update, search, and complete tasks.

servers.name: Google Sheets
servers.description: Read and write Google Sheets — get values, update cells, append rows, create/format spreadsheets.

env_required.description: OAuth2 refresh token with sheets scope

servers.name: Pinecone
servers.description: Query and manage Pinecone vector indexes — upsert, query by vector, list namespaces, and delete vectors.

servers.name: Elasticsearch
servers.description: Index, search, and manage Elasticsearch documents. Full-text search, aggregations, and index management.

servers.name: OpenAI
servers.description: Access OpenAI models — completions, embeddings, image generation (DALL-E), and assistants API.

servers.name: YouTube
servers.description: Search YouTube videos, get transcripts/captions, retrieve channel info and video metadata.

env_optional.description: YouTube Data API v3 key (required for search/metadata)

servers.name: Spotify
servers.description: Control Spotify playback, search tracks and albums, manage playlists, and get recommendations.

env_required.description: OAuth redirect URI registered in your Spotify app

servers.name: X / Twitter
servers.description: Post tweets, read timelines, search tweets, manage DMs and lists via the X/Twitter API v2.

servers.name: Memory (Knowledge Graph)
servers.description: Persistent knowledge graph memory. Create entities, store relations, and query structured facts across sessions.

env_optional.description: Path to the knowledge graph JSON file (default: in-memory)

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Structured multi-step reasoning tool. Breaks complex problems into sequential thoughts with revision support.

servers.name: Time
servers.description: Get current time in any timezone, convert between timezones, and format timestamps.

servers.name: OpenWeather
servers.description: Current weather and 5-day forecasts for any city using the OpenWeatherMap API.

servers.name: Salesforce
servers.description: Query and manage Salesforce objects — leads, contacts, accounts, opportunities, cases via SOQL and REST API.

servers.name: EverArt
servers.description: Generate AI images using EverArt's image generation API. Create artwork, illustrations, and visual assets.

servers.name: Perplexity
servers.description: AI-powered search and summarisation using Perplexity's Sonar API. Returns cited, up-to-date answers.

servers.name: Datadog
servers.description: Query Datadog metrics, logs, monitors, dashboards, and incidents for observability and alerting.

servers.name: GitHub Actions
servers.description: Trigger, monitor, and inspect GitHub Actions workflow runs, jobs, and artifacts.

servers.name: Everything (Test Server)
servers.description: Reference MCP server for testing. Exposes all MCP primitive types: tools, resources, prompts, sampling.
